diagnosis.signal: UoW uow_20260428_d4e5f6 returned from first execution with outcome=partial; Executor determined that the proposed API schema change requires independent security and ergonomics review before a recommendation can be made.
diagnosis.completion_gap: Executor completed investigation but flagged that the design decision requires two independent perspectives before a recommendation is safe to make.

prescription.summary: Conduct parallel security and ergonomics review of the proposed v2 API schema; merge findings into a single recommendation document.
prescription.instructions:
Two parallel Executor agents will review the proposed v2 API schema (see ~/lobster-workspace/workstreams/uow_20260428_d4e5f6/proposed-schema.json).

Agent 1 (security focus): Evaluate the proposed schema for authentication gaps, data exposure risks, and injection surface area. Write findings to ~/lobster-workspace/workstreams/uow_20260428_d4e5f6/security-review.md.

Agent 2 (ergonomics focus): Evaluate the proposed schema for API consistency, naming conventions, and consumer usability. Write findings to ~/lobster-workspace/workstreams/uow_20260428_d4e5f6/ergonomics-review.md.

After both agents complete, the Steward will merge findings into a final recommendation.

Minimum viable output: Both review documents present and non-empty.
Boundary: do not modify the proposed schema or any production API files.
prescription.minimum_viable_output: Both security-review.md and ergonomics-review.md present and non-empty
prescription.boundary: do not modify the proposed schema or any production API files

steps: Merge findings from security-review.md and ergonomics-review.md
Produce a single recommendation document with a clear go/no-go signal

fan_out.focus: Security review: authentication gaps, data exposure, injection surface
Ergonomics review: API consistency, naming conventions, consumer usability

constraints.boundary: do not modify the proposed schema or any production API files

success_criteria.check: Both security-review.md and ergonomics-review.md exist and are non-empty. Each contains a section titled 'Findings' and a section titled 'Recommendation'.

dan_context.orientation: This is the second cycle of the v2 API schema review; the first cycle surfaced the need for independent perspectives.
dan_context.priority_signal: The v2 API is blocking two downstream features; the review needs to resolve before those can proceed.
open_questions: Should the security reviewer also evaluate the authentication token refresh flow, or is that out of scope for this UoW?
dan_context.load_bearing_assumption: proposed-schema.json at the workstream path reflects the latest version discussed in the design session.
